title: Berlinale Generation Queer Horror Pic ‘No Salgas’ Picked Up by Berlin-Based Arthood Entertainment (EXCLUSIVE)
content:
ByAnna Marie de la Fuente

Berlin-basedArtHood Entertainmenthas picked up worldwide sales rights to Dominican drama “No salgas” (“Stay Quiet”) ahead of its Berlinale Generation premiere.

The queer coming-of-age horror pic, which stars Camila Issa (seen inNickelodeon’s “Are You Afraid of the Dark”), Cecile van Welie (San Sebastian’s New Directors Award winner “Carajita”) and Camila Santana (“Ramona”), follows Liz (Van Welie), a college Med student who is struggling with her sexual identity in a highly conservativeDominican Republic. An evil supernatural force begins to target people close to her.

The story begins with two teens fleeing into the night where one is killed by her possessed mother. Liz secretly loves Wendy, who is murdered by her crazed brother. A year later, grief and desire resurface on a memorial trip as the force turns friends violent. Liz escapes, knowing that whatever was unleashed has not been fully crushed.

“No salgas” marks the directorial fiction feature debut for Victoria Linares, known for her neo-realist docu-fiction hybrid, “Ramona,” which also world premiered at the Berlinale’s Generation sidebar. It went on to win the Grand Prix Documentaire atCinélatino2024 and land at indie streaming platform Mubi.

“The dynamics of coexistence and power have always favored a heteronormative society. The Dominican Republic is highly conservative, which only highlights the inadequacy of the concept of an ‘ally,’ an idea that in ‘No salgas’ is more performative than supportive, and often does not stem from genuine understanding, but from reflexive tolerance,” said Linares in her director’s statement. “The ally can be understanding and, at the same time, contribute, out of ignorance, to oppressive social environments.”

“We are truly excited to work on ‘No salgas,’ it is such an impressive film that haunted us for a while after watching it, not what we would expect from Generation. Victoria is a very talented director with a brilliant future ahead and with her powerful and gripping film she managed to combine artistic qualities with festival and commercial potential.  She is extremely smart in using horror to elaborate on the conservative Dominican society. It is definitely a film that cannot be missed at Berlinale: entertaining, relevant and universal,” said Arthood’s Manola Novelli.

The LGBTQ-themed horror pic brings to mind a similar Latin American film that employed the horror genre to comment on the realities of a society: Jayro Bustamante’s “La Llorona.” In this acclaimed Guatemalan drama, Bustamante interweaves a fictional horror format to shed light on the atrocities committed by the local military in the 1980s.

“No salgas” is produced by writer-producer Carlos Marranzini, José Jiménez and Linares. El Perro de Argento, the Dominican Republic-based production company founded by Linares and Carlos Marranzini, holds the sales rights to the Dominican Republic.
title_zh: 柏林影展世代系列的酷兒恐怖片《不要出去》(No Salgas) 被柏林的Arthood Entertainment公司買下（獨家報導）
content_zh:
由安娜·瑪麗·德拉·豐特(Anna Marie de la Fuente)報導

位於柏林的ArtHood Entertainment已獲得多米尼加劇情片《不出門(No salgas)》的全球發行權，該片將於柏林電影節的Generation單元首映。

這部以酷兒成長為主題的恐怖片由卡米拉·伊薩(Camila Issa)主演，她曾在尼克頻道的《你怕黑嗎?(Are You Afraid of the Dark)》中出現，塞西爾·范·維利(Cecile van Welie)主演過聖塞巴斯蒂安新導演獎獲獎作品《卡拉希塔(Carajita)》，以及卡米拉·桑塔納(Camila Santana)主演的《拉莫娜(Ramona)》。故事圍繞著大學醫學生莉茲(Van Welie)，她在高度保守的多米尼加共和國中掙扎於自己的性別認同。隨著一股邪惡的超自然力量開始針對她身邊的人，故事展開。

故事開始於兩名青少年在夜晚逃亡，其中一人被她被附身的母親殺死。莉茲暗戀的溫迪(Wendy)被她瘋狂的兄弟謀殺。一年後，悲傷和渴望在一次紀念旅行中重新浮現，隨著這股力量使朋友們變得暴力，莉茲逃脫，意識到那股被釋放的力量並未完全被壓制。

《不出門(No salgas)》是導演維多利亞·利納雷斯(Victoria Linares)的首部劇情長片，她以新現實主義的紀錄片與虛構混合作品《拉莫娜(Ramona)》而聞名，該片也曾在柏林電影節的Generation單元首映。該片隨後在Cinélatino 2024獲得了最佳紀錄片大獎，並在獨立串流平台Mubi上放映。

利納雷斯在她的導演聲明中表示：“共存與權力的動態一直以來都偏向異性戀社會。多米尼加共和國非常保守，這更突顯了‘盟友’概念的不足，這個概念在《不出門(No salgas)》中更像是表演而非支持，往往不是出於真正的理解，而是出於反射性的包容。”她補充道：“盟友可以是理解的，同時也可能因無知而助長壓迫性的社會環境。”

ArtHood的馬諾拉·諾維利(Manola Novelli)表示：“我們對於能夠參與《不出門(No salgas)》感到非常興奮，這是一部令人印象深刻的電影，觀看後讓我們久久無法忘懷，這並不是我們對Generation的預期。維多利亞是一位非常有才華的導演，前途光明，她用這部強而有力且引人入勝的電影成功地將藝術品質與影展及商業潛力結合在一起。她非常聰明地利用恐怖元素來闡述保守的多米尼加社會。這絕對是一部在柏林電影節上不容錯過的電影：娛樂性、相關性和普遍性兼具。”

這部以LGBTQ為主題的恐怖片讓人想起一部類似的拉丁美洲電影，該片利用恐怖類型來評論社會現實：哈伊羅·布斯塔曼特(Jayro Bustamante)的《哭泣的女人(La Llorona)》。在這部備受讚譽的危地馬拉劇情片中，布斯塔曼特將虛構的恐怖格式與1980年代當地軍隊所犯下的暴行交織在一起。

《不出門(No salgas)》由編劇兼製片人卡洛斯·馬蘭齊尼(Carlos Marranzini)、何塞·希門尼斯(José Jiménez)和利納雷斯共同製作。由利納雷斯和卡洛斯·馬蘭齊尼創立的多米尼加共和國製作公司El Perro de Argento擁有該片在多米尼加共和國的發行權。
